Subject: Subject\Sample Allocation
Test Name: Security Matrix - Appliciation and Tab Visibility
Description:
This Test is to verify the security Matrix for Sample Allocation related objects

Objectives:
1.To Verify that the Object Level access and Field Level Specification  of Sample Allocation Cycle  and Sample Allocation Request entity

Preconditions:
-Application IQ documents must be executed and post approved in the QA environment.
Users:
User#1: RSM/RD User; Profile name: ADC - Sales Manager
User#2: Compliance User; Profile name: ADC - Compliance User

References
[COM-25-00323]- Change Request Sales Assist Release 25R3 (Veeva 25R1)

Notes to Tester
The full screen should be captured rather than a field, pop-up box, etc.
The user id should be visible in the screenprint if shown on the screen.
When multiple screen prints are captured for a step, the numbering should be documented for each (1 of 3)
When fields are being verified, the field name must be expanded (fully visible) in the screen print.
Multiple screen prints might be needed to capture the full intent of the requirement.
